title: xantolis cambodiana var. thorelii
intro: Xantolis cambodiana var. thorelii, also known as the Thorel's Xantolis or Siamese Yellow Orange, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Xantolis cambodiana var. thorelii include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating infections, wounds, and other conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
